nasb.text: Then He cried out in my hearing with a loud voice saying, “Draw near, O executioners of the city, each with his destroying weapon in his hand.”

esv.text: Then he cried in my ears with a loud voice, saying, “Bring near the executioners of the city, each with his destroying weapon in his hand.”

cnv.text: 我聽見他大聲呼叫說：“懲罰這城的啊！你們要近前來，各人手裡拿著滅命的武器。”

ccb.text: 我听见祂高声呼喊说：“惩罚这城的人啊，拿起你们的兵器上前来吧！”
